### CFB Coaches

### Transfer Portal

[![Who was the last quarterback signed, developed and retained by each Big Ten team?](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)Who was the last quarterback signed, developed and retained by each Big Ten team?The list includes three players named Nathan (or Nate), a walk-on who is now in the NFL and a Cornhusker who won nine games three times!Antonio Morales![Comments count](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iOSIgaGVpZ2h0PSI5IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMjQgMjQiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0wLjMxOTMzNiAwLjMxNTc5NkgyMi42ODA0VjIzLjc2MDlMMTYuMjE0IDE3LjM2ODRIMC4zMTkzMzZWMC4zMTU3OTZaIiBmaWxsPSIjNTI0RjRGIj48L3BhdGg+Cjwvc3ZnPgo=)1](<https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7178249/2026/04/09/college-football-transfers-recruiting-quarterback-big-ten/>)
[![Indiana's dream coaching duo and who wins a title first: Oregon or Gonzaga? Mandel's Mailbag](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)Indiana's dream coaching duo and who wins a title first: Oregon or Gonzaga? Mandel's MailbagWhy its so hard to do preseason rankings, the three-loss team College Football Playoff debate and more in this week's mailbag.Stewart Mandel![Comments count](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iOSIgaGVpZ2h0PSI5IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMjQgMjQiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0wLjMxOTMzNiAwLjMxNTc5NkgyMi42ODA0VjIzLjc2MDlMMTYuMjE0IDE3LjM2ODRIMC4zMTkzMzZWMC4zMTU3OTZaIiBmaWxsPSIjNTI0RjRGIj48L3BhdGg+Cjwvc3ZnPgo=)59](<https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7182363/2026/04/09/indiana-coaching-national-title-oregon-gonzaga/>)
[SKIP ADVERTISEMENT](<#after-mid1-1-ad>)
Advertisement
[![Colorado QB Dominiq Ponder had blood alcohol level twice the legal limit in fatal crash](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)Colorado QB Dominiq Ponder had blood alcohol level twice the legal limit in fatal crashPonder died March 1 in a single-vehicle crash when his Tesla broke through a guardrail on Baseline Road in Boulder, Colo.David Ubben![Comments count](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iOSIgaGVpZ2h0PSI5IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMjQgMjQiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0wLjMxOTMzNiAwLjMxNTc5NkgyMi42ODA0VjIzLjc2MDlMMTYuMjE0IDE3LjM2ODRIMC4zMTkzMzZWMC4zMTU3OTZaIiBmaWxsPSIjNTI0RjRGIj48L3BhdGg+Cjwvc3ZnPgo=)78](<https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7181143/2026/04/08/colorado-dominiq-ponder-autopsy-report/>)
[![Big Ten's secret to hoarding trophies? Find elite college coaches, not elite complainers](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)Big Ten's secret to hoarding trophies? Find elite college coaches, not elite complainersThe explanation to the conference's success may be as simple as this: Big Ten schools hired Curt Cignetti and Dusty May.Stewart Mandel![Comments count](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iOSIgaGVpZ2h0PSI5IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMjQgMjQiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0wLjMxOTMzNiAwLjMxNTc5NkgyMi42ODA0VjIzLjc2MDlMMTYuMjE0IDE3LjM2ODRIMC4zMTkzMzZWMC4zMTU3OTZaIiBmaWxsPSIjNTI0RjRGIj48L3BhdGg+Cjwvc3ZnPgo=)273](<https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7179426/2026/04/08/big-ten-championships-elite-coaches-michigan-ucla-indiana/>)
[![Explore more than 2,700 NFL Draft prospects in the 2026 edition of 'The Beast'](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)Explore more than 2,700 NFL Draft prospects in the 2026 edition of 'The Beast'Welcome to the Explore page of The Beast 2026, where you can filter, sort and compare more than 2,700 NFL prospects. Use this tool to find and compare groups of players, searching by college, NCAA conference, position or Dane Brugler’s draft grade. And you can sort the resulting lists by any measure you like, including detailed NFL scouting data you won’t find tabulated anywhere else. Dane Brugler](<https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7151743/2026/04/08/explore-more-than-2700-nfl-draft-prospects-in-the-2026-edition-of-the-beast/>)
[![NFL Draft 2026 rankings: Dane Brugler breaks down the top 100 prospects across all positions](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)NFL Draft 2026 rankings: Dane Brugler breaks down the top 100 prospects across all positionsDane Brugler](<https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7147159/2026/04/08/nfl-draft-2026-rankings-dane-brugler-breaks-down-the-top-100-prospects-across-all-positions/>)
[!['The Beast' printable version: NFL Draft 2026 scouting reports and player prospect rankings](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)'The Beast' printable version: NFL Draft 2026 scouting reports and player prospect rankingsCheck out our downloadable, printable PDF with more than 600 pages of information about the 2026 NFL Draft prospects.Dane Brugler![Comments count](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iOSIgaGVpZ2h0PSI5IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMjQgMjQiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0wLjMxOTMzNiAwLjMxNTc5NkgyMi42ODA0VjIzLjc2MDlMMTYuMjE0IDE3LjM2ODRIMC4zMTkzMzZWMC4zMTU3OTZaIiBmaWxsPSIjNTI0RjRGIj48L3BhdGg+Cjwvc3ZnPgo=)49](<https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7111977/2026/04/08/the-beast-printable-version-nfl-draft-2026-scouting-reports-and-player-prospect-rankings/>)
[![NFL Draft 2026 ‘The Beast’ Guide: Dane Brugler’s definitive scouting reports and player rankings](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)NFL Draft 2026 ‘The Beast’ Guide: Dane Brugler’s definitive scouting reports and player rankingsWelcome to The Beast 2026, the world’s most comprehensive NFL Draft guide. It’s the result of thousands of hours of interviews, film study and conversations with scouts, coaches, agents and other NFL decision-makers. There’s a lot new this year. You’ll find an explore page that lets you filter and sort more than 2,700 players in The Beast, by position, school, draft grade or NFL combine measurement. We have videos and film analysis for dozens of top prospects — a collaboration with my colleagues at “The Athletic Football Show.” We’ll also expand our overall rankings to...Dane Brugler![Comments count](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iOSIgaGVpZ2h0PSI5IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMjQgMjQiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0wLjMxOTMzNiAwLjMxNTc5NkgyMi42ODA0VjIzLjc2MDlMMTYuMjE0IDE3LjM2ODRIMC4zMTkzMzZWMC4zMTU3OTZaIiBmaWxsPSIjNTI0RjRGIj48L3BhdGg+Cjwvc3ZnPgo=)4](<https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7147150/2026/04/08/nfl-draft-2026-the-beast-guide-dane-bruglers-definitive-scouting-reports-and-player-rankings/>)

[![Imagine having both Curt Cignetti and Dusty May. Could've happened!](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)Imagine having both Curt Cignetti and Dusty May. Could've happened!Until Saturday is The Athletic's free college football newsletter.Jason Kirk![Comments count](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iOSIgaGVpZ2h0PSI5IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMjQgMjQiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0wLjMxOTMzNiAwLjMxNTc5NkgyMi42ODA0VjIzLjc2MDlMMTYuMjE0IDE3LjM2ODRIMC4zMTkzMzZWMC4zMTU3OTZaIiBmaWxsPSIjNTI0RjRGIj48L3BhdGg+Cjwvc3ZnPgo=)2](<https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7179220/2026/04/07/dusty-may-michigan-until-saturday/>)
[![Will college football have NFL-style OTAs by 2027? It's 'more than likely'](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)Will college football have NFL-style OTAs by 2027? It's 'more than likely'The future of spring games is increasingly uncertain, but actual spring practice is on the verge of expanding.Seth Emerson![Comments count](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iOSIgaGVpZ2h0PSI5IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMjQgMjQiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0wLjMxOTMzNiAwLjMxNTc5NkgyMi42ODA0VjIzLjc2MDlMMTYuMjE0IDE3LjM2ODRIMC4zMTkzMzZWMC4zMTU3OTZaIiBmaWxsPSIjNTI0RjRGIj48L3BhdGg+Cjwvc3ZnPgo=)5](<https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7178460/2026/04/07/college-football-spring-practice-nfl-otas/>)
[![Michigan's national title is the latest chapter in a year of Big Ten dominance](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)Michigan's national title is the latest chapter in a year of Big Ten dominanceFrom Indiana football to Northwestern field hockey, the Big Ten has continued to win national championships across multiple sports.Devon Henderson![Comments count](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iOSIgaGVpZ2h0PSI5IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMjQgMjQiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0wLjMxOTMzNiAwLjMxNTc5NkgyMi42ODA0VjIzLjc2MDlMMTYuMjE0IDE3LjM2ODRIMC4zMTkzMzZWMC4zMTU3OTZaIiBmaWxsPSIjNTI0RjRGIj48L3BhdGg+Cjwvc3ZnPgo=)72](<https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7177301/2026/04/07/michigan-big-ten-dominance-national-championship/>)
[![Who are the best Group of 6 transfers heading to the Power 4?](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)Who are the best Group of 6 transfers heading to the Power 4?During the winter (and only) portal window, 114 Group of 6 players who earned all-conference honors transferred to Power 4 schools.Manny Navarro![Comments count](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iOSIgaGVpZ2h0PSI5IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMjQgMjQiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0wLjMxOTMzNiAwLjMxNTc5NkgyMi42ODA0VjIzLjc2MDlMMTYuMjE0IDE3LjM2ODRIMC4zMTkzMzZWMC4zMTU3OTZaIiBmaWxsPSIjNTI0RjRGIj48L3BhdGg+Cjwvc3ZnPgo=)25](<https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7169249/2026/04/06/college-football-transfer-portal-group-6-power-4/>)
[![Predicting 2026 NFL Draft picks 1-100, starting with Fernando Mendoza](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)Predicting 2026 NFL Draft picks 1-100, starting with Fernando MendozaThis draft likely won't bring a run on Round 1 quarterbacks, but there is impressive depth at several other key positions.Nick Baumgardner![Comments count](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iOSIgaGVpZ2h0PSI5IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMjQgMjQiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0wLjMxOTMzNiAwLjMxNTc5NkgyMi42ODA0VjIzLjc2MDlMMTYuMjE0IDE3LjM2ODRIMC4zMTkzMzZWMC4zMTU3OTZaIiBmaWxsPSIjNTI0RjRGIj48L3BhdGg+Cjwvc3ZnPgo=)275](<https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7172035/2026/04/06/nfl-mock-draft-2026-mendoza-raiders-three-rounds/>)
[![Submit a question for Stewart Mandel's College Football Mailbag](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)Submit a question for Stewart Mandel's College Football MailbagThe SEC championship game may be on its death bed, but the Mailbag isn’t going anywhere. Leave your questions here. Please include your city. Stewart Mandel![Comments count](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iOSIgaGVpZ2h0PSI5IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMjQgMjQiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0wLjMxOTMzNiAwLjMxNTc5NkgyMi42ODA0VjIzLjc2MDlMMTYuMjE0IDE3LjM2ODRIMC4zMTkzMzZWMC4zMTU3OTZaIiBmaWxsPSIjNTI0RjRGIj48L3BhdGg+Cjwvc3ZnPgo=)109](<https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7175009/2026/04/06/submit-a-question-for-stewart-mandels-college-football-mailbag-341/>)

[![NCAA president Charlie Baker on Trump executive order: Hopeful for 'bipartisan solution'](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)NCAA president Charlie Baker on Trump executive order: Hopeful for 'bipartisan solution'Trump's order mandates limiting athletes to one unrestricted transfer as undergraduates and puts a five-year cap on college eligibility.Joe Rexrode![Comments count](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iOSIgaGVpZ2h0PSI5IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMjQgMjQiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0wLjMxOTMzNiAwLjMxNTc5NkgyMi42ODA0VjIzLjc2MDlMMTYuMjE0IDE3LjM2ODRIMC4zMTkzMzZWMC4zMTU3OTZaIiBmaWxsPSIjNTI0RjRGIj48L3BhdGg+Cjwvc3ZnPgo=)60](<https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7172414/2026/04/04/charlie-baker-trump-executive-order-final-four/>)
[![Trump signs new executive order on college sports: Will it change anything, and how soon?](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)Trump signs new executive order on college sports: Will it change anything, and how soon?The order poses the possibility of federal funding being withheld from schools that do not comply with the rules.Ralph D. Russo and Justin Williams![Comments count](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iOSIgaGVpZ2h0PSI5IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMjQgMjQiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0wLjMxOTMzNiAwLjMxNTc5NkgyMi42ODA0VjIzLjc2MDlMMTYuMjE0IDE3LjM2ODRIMC4zMTkzMzZWMC4zMTU3OTZaIiBmaWxsPSIjNTI0RjRGIj48L3BhdGg+Cjwvc3ZnPgo=)976](<https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7169907/2026/04/03/trump-executive-order-college-sports-rules/>)
[![As the future of the SEC Championship Game is in peril, here’s why it could be here to stay](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)As the future of the SEC Championship Game is in peril, here’s why it could be here to stayIn an expanded College Football Playoff — currently at 12, probably even more soon — being the conference champion is almost irrelevant.Seth Emerson![Comments count](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iOSIgaGVpZ2h0PSI5IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMjQgMjQiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0wLjMxOTMzNiAwLjMxNTc5NkgyMi42ODA0VjIzLjc2MDlMMTYuMjE0IDE3LjM2ODRIMC4zMTkzMzZWMC4zMTU3OTZaIiBmaWxsPSIjNTI0RjRGIj48L3BhdGg+Cjwvc3ZnPgo=)72](<https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7169578/2026/04/03/sec-championship-game-ending-greg-sankey/>)
[![The day Indiana's national championship trophy tour came to Notre Dame's backyard](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)The day Indiana's national championship trophy tour came to Notre Dame's backyardAs part of a nine-stop tour around the state, the Hoosiers' haul spent the afternoon in South Bend, three miles from Notre Dame's campus.Pete Sampson![Comments count](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iOSIgaGVpZ2h0PSI5IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMjQgMjQiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0wLjMxOTMzNiAwLjMxNTc5NkgyMi42ODA0VjIzLjc2MDlMMTYuMjE0IDE3LjM2ODRIMC4zMTkzMzZWMC4zMTU3OTZaIiBmaWxsPSIjNTI0RjRGIj48L3BhdGg+Cjwvc3ZnPgo=)66](<https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7169061/2026/04/03/indiana-football-national-championship-trophy-tour-notre-dame/>)

  *[ARST]: Arkansas State Red Wolves
  *[TXST]: Texas State Bobcats
  *[USA]: South Alabama Jaguars
